channel.title: Toonout
channel.description: Latest releases from Toonout on Dropout.tv

item.title: Blink Twice If You’re Dead
item.description:
Detective Person and Agent Bingles investigate the murder of Ol' Jimmy Bones.

Duration: 03:41

Tags: Toonout, animation, experimental, slapstick, witty and clever, unpredictable, whimsy, weird, Blink Twice If You're Dead, film noir, detectives, mysteries, crime, murder, gambling, ify nwadiwe, victor courtright, caitlin reilly
